LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS COMPLAINT. ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: GRANTED. THE STRONG POLICY FAVORING PERMITTING AMENDMENTS TO PLEADINGS AND THE LACK OF ANY PREJUDICE TO THE PROPOSED CROSS-DEFENDANTS SUPPORTS GRANTING THIS MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO 11/5/12 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 206. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed as to remaining cross complaint pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FIDELA MARTEL'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint is off calendar. Notice of Settlement filed on September 17, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF FIDELA MARTEL'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Ikuko Satoda And Production Of Documents; Req. For Sanctions is off calendar per email to the court. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not reported. =302/JPT

Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Continued To Oct-05-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Continued To Nov-05-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Teresa Tan, DCA, from the Office of the City Attorney, 415-554-4272, for defendant and moving party CCSF
Kelli E. George, Esq., from The Law Offices of Thomas O'Hagan, 510-587-1609, for defendants and opposing party 670 Howard Street LLC and San Francisco Museum Of Modern Art
Judith Graziano, Esq., from The Hassell Law Group, 415-334-4111, for plaintiff Fidela Martel

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as modified.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint is Granted. The strong policy favoring permitting amendments to pleadings and the lack of any prejudice to the proposed cross-defendants supports granting this motion.
The trial date is continued to 11/5/12 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 206. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Set For Trial On Aug-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
